description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly blue upper and a white rubber sole. The upper material appears to be a combination of mesh and synthetic leather, providing both breathability and structure. The heel features a white accent patch, while the toe and side panels are textured for added visual interest. The shoe is equipped with standard criss-cross lacing and has a padded collar for comfort. The outsole shows some signs of dirt and wear, indicating it has been used in urban environments. The overall design is casual and versatile, suitable for everyday wear in city settings.
description: A blue low-top sneaker with a white sole, mesh and synthetic upper, and standard lacing. Features a white heel accent and shows signs of light urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the white heel accent and the back of the white sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue mesh upper, white heel patch, and full side profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the lacing system, toe box, and the shoe's overall width.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible mesh texture and white heel accent.
